title: Nursing
shortDescription: B.Sc Nursing, GNM, and allied programs at top colleges.
overview: Our nursing programs connect you with leading institutions offering B.Sc Nursing, GNM, and post-basic specializations. We guide you through eligibility, entrance exams, and seat allocation.
eligibility: 10+2 with PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) with minimum 45% aggregate. Some colleges accept PCM. Age criteria may apply.
admissionRequirements: Valid NEET/state entrance score, 10+2 marksheet, transfer certificate, identity proof, and passport-size photographs.
careerOpportunities: Hospital staff nurse, ICU nurse, community health nurse, nursing educator, overseas placements, and healthcare administration.

title: Engineering
shortDescription: B.Tech and M.Tech in CSE, ECE, Mechanical, and more.
overview: Secure admissions to top engineering colleges for B.Tech and M.Tech across branches including Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical, Civil, and emerging specializations.
eligibility: 10+2 with PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) with minimum 45–50% depending on college. JEE Main / KCET / COMEDK scores considered.
admissionRequirements: KCET/COMEDK/JEE Main rank card, 10+2 marksheet, caste certificate if applicable, and college-specific documents.
careerOpportunities: Software engineer, core engineering roles, research, higher studies abroad, and entrepreneurship.

title: Management
shortDescription: MBA, BBA, and PGDM from reputed business schools.
overview: We help you get into top MBA, BBA, and PGDM programs in Karnataka and across India. From CAT/MAT preparation guidance to college shortlisting and admission support.
eligibility: Graduation in any discipline for MBA/PGDM (50% typically). 10+2 for BBA. CAT, MAT, CMAT, or state-level scores accepted.
admissionRequirements: Graduation marksheet, entrance score card, work experience certificate if any, and statement of purpose where required.
careerOpportunities: Corporate roles in marketing, finance, HR, operations, consulting, and leadership positions.

title: Medical
shortDescription: MBBS, BDS, and allied medical courses.
overview: Comprehensive support for MBBS, BDS, and other medical degree admissions. We work with colleges that accept NEET scores and state quotas.
eligibility: 10+2 with PCB, minimum 50% aggregate. Valid NEET score. Age and attempt limits as per NMC guidelines.
admissionRequirements: NEET score card, 10+2 certificates, caste/income certificate if applicable, and medical fitness certificate.
careerOpportunities: Doctor, dentist, specialist, hospital administration, and research in medical sciences.

title: Pharmacy
shortDescription: B.Pharm, D.Pharm, M.Pharm from top institutions.
overview: Admission support for B.Pharm, D.Pharm, and M.Pharm programs at PCI-approved colleges. We assist with counseling and documentation.
eligibility: 10+2 with PCB or PCM. Minimum 45% for B.Pharm. GPAT for M.Pharm. State entrance exams where applicable.
admissionRequirements: 10+2 marksheet, entrance rank/score, transfer certificate, and identity proof.
careerOpportunities: Pharmacist, clinical research, pharmaceutical industry, regulatory affairs, and higher studies.

title: Arts & Science
shortDescription: B.A, B.Sc, B.Com and postgraduate programs.
overview: Wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs in Arts, Science, and Commerce from reputed universities and autonomous colleges.
eligibility: 10+2 in relevant stream. Minimum marks as per university. Some courses require entrance tests.
admissionRequirements: 10+2 marksheet, caste certificate if applicable, and university-specific application forms.
careerOpportunities: Teaching, research, corporate roles, civil services, and sector-specific careers.
